feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Shmup thread
entry.content: You guys play games right? What's the last shmup you played? It better be good or I will have to take your vidya privileges away. Played Keio Flying Squadron lately, it's fun and based.

entry.content: Latams is thos true?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Nintendo is /v/ Disney
entry.content: It's kinda creepy how eerily similar Shiggy and Nintendo are to Disney even to the point where in later stage of shiggy's career he is leading the creation of them parks. People in the past have made connections to Disney when discussing Nintendo but I truly feel now with the success of the Switch era and the Hollywood movies, Nintendo now has officially become the Disney of video games. You can pint post April 5th 2023 with the launch of the animated Mario movie as the hard date for this shift.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Dark World / DJ Lucas
entry.content: so does anyone actually know what the allegations were against DJ Lucas? It's clear that Dark World kind of disbanded and everyone went in their own directions, and there's bits and pieces in comments sections across the internet saying that Lucas has some SA allegations but he got them wiped from the internet somehow. What actually happened? It's a shame because following Dark World was super fun, lots of creativity coming out of those guys but it seems like it's all fallen apart since this shi

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: 80s Movies Suck
entry.content: >Dude! Dude! You just had to be there for the action-packed high testosterone extravaganza of consumerist, soulless goyslop! It was so good bro! Cinema peaked in the 60s and went quickly downhill in the 70s, then you end up with the garish waste that is 80s action and horror movies.

entry.title: /int/ International: >Spain population: 50 million >Latinoamerican and Caribbean population: 670 mill…
entry.content: >Spain population: 50 million >Latinoamerican and Caribbean population: 670 million how come 95% of all spanish speaking youtubers and twitch streamers are Spaniard?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Soulslike clones are an over-saturated market, with few that come to understand …
entry.content: Soulslike clones are an over-saturated market, with few that come to understand the core concepts that makes it great. this is especially so with large companies who wish to create something similar without the soul or essence, It comes evidently clear the ignorance in companies when someone who read too much Alice can come up with a more honest souls-like than so called "professionals" and their limitless budget. When will companies understand what makes the souls series great?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: in retrospect Adam was a real piece of shit manipulating and using raven to perf…
entry.content: in retrospect Adam was a real piece of shit manipulating and using raven to perform eugenics on angels and lying and being a double agent to destroy xion all while pretending to be a friend to eve and lily the way he treats raven reminds me of how miquella treated his sister the good ending being the one where he wins kinda gives me the ick

entry.title: /b/ Random: I dont know if this belongs here to /b but I'll ask anyway. Facebook memes haven…
entry.content: I dont know if this belongs here to /b but I'll ask anyway. Facebook memes haven't really been active for a long time, and like a young people I'd like to follow memes on Instagram instead. How can I do that? For example, I'd like to see the same kinds of memes that I used to follow on Facebook about eight years ago. Thanks.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: At some point GPUs will become so valuable, the government will have no choice b…
entry.content: At some point GPUs will become so valuable, the government will have no choice but to declare eminent domain on the population's GPUs. They will offer fair-market prices for your GPUs, but if you don't agree to sell they WILL take them from you. Control of GPUs will become an existential matter for countries.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: >paying twice as much for a 'reliable' car with over 100k or just buying a cheap…
entry.content: >paying twice as much for a 'reliable' car with over 100k or just buying a cheap low mileage domestic

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Pickup is a body style, truck is a construction type. A Ford F-150 is a pickup t…
entry.content: Pickup is a body style, truck is a construction type. A Ford F-150 is a pickup truck, a Maverick is a pickup, an Expedition is a truck. Also if it's not a truck it's not an SUV but instead a crossover, like the current Explorer. Not open to having my mind changed but don't let that stop you.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: This shit ruined software developers. I remember when I used to fetch a manual f…
entry.content: This shit ruined software developers. I remember when I used to fetch a manual for the language or library I used and actually RTFM unlike now, people just google search their way to sub optimal results I refuse to use anything that was built by these onions devs they're not even coding anymore, searching for an answer isn't sustainable, we're wasting thousands of petabytes of storage just so people can search for answers they should be looking up in books or have notes

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Anyone else love a lot of Hardcore music but hate the Hardcore scene
entry.content: I'm a metalhead, but I really love a lot of Hardcore. The scene has been thriving post covid, and a lot of great music has been coming out, lots of new bands have been getting there flowers in a bit way. That being said the hardcore community and culture is fucking shit. It's the WORST mix of douchebag tough-guys, and left-wing söyboi, lots of hicklibs, and weird larping zoomers who are really just there because. To make things even worse, the metal scene is basically the same now, go to any lar

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Why do they drip-feed us long-requested biomes once a year instead of just addin…
entry.content: Why do they drip-feed us long-requested biomes once a year instead of just adding multiple in one update? We're still missing dozens of biomes that should've been added years ago, like cypress wetlands, mediterranean plains (with Iberian/Italian-style villages), palm trees, redwoods, etc.

entry.title: /int/ International: 10 years ago england voted to become a footnote on the global stage. Today they …
entry.content: 10 years ago england voted to become a footnote on the global stage. Today they still really cannot explain why they did it. Ever since, the UK hasn't had a stable government and has been flooded with brown immigrants. A once mighty empire is now basically western Europe's version of Italy, but with a standard of living that is being overtaken by eastern european backwaters like Poland Is there any country that also fumbled this hard for no good reason?

entry.title: /b/ Random: Cosas depravadas que hacen
entry.content: Comienzo yo, tengo una prima que me exita mucho, tomo sus bragas y sostenes y me mas turbo con ellos y los huelo, tambien tomo su maquillaje y me lo pongo en el pene, edos los labiales, a sus cremas les agrego un poco de mi semen para que lo tenga siempre en la cara

entry.title: /b/ Random: people were nicer to me when i was a kid everyday i get older i feel the world h…
entry.content: people were nicer to me when i was a kid everyday i get older i feel the world hating me more and more i dont feel like existing anymore for the past few weeks it has only become worse i have small moments of being happy until i remember again i dont know the answer i already know i will take it one day so i dont know whats stopping me from doing it tonight

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Metallica
entry.content: I decided to look for Metallica's *Reload* and *Kill 'Em All* albums in FLAC format, but I couldn't find them for free. They are on VKontakte, but some files wouldn't download—it was as if they had been deleted, yet the links remained. Could you suggest where else I might find these albums in FLAC format for free?

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Hello /mu/, I am a refugee from /g/ who doesn't want to post on the AI-jeet boar…
entry.content: Hello /mu/, I am a refugee from /g/ who doesn't want to post on the AI-jeet board and figured there'd be more knowledgable anons here. No idea how slow/fast the board is but I've read through the sticky and it didn't have the answers so fuck it I'm posting a thread. Anyway, After toying about over the years with a midi controller here and there, and an upright piano my wife's parents have, I want to buy a keyboard that I can learn on and would be sufficent for a hobby. No, I'm probably not going

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I'm starting to really like using Gemini It's now my go to AI and replaced ChatG…
entry.content: I'm starting to really like using Gemini It's now my go to AI and replaced ChatGPT. It doesn't slow down. It doesn't move me to a weaker model and it can handle long running conversations without flaking out on me / having to make new chats. What are /g/'s thoughts on Gemini?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The death of male approaching and its consequences
entry.content: Men are retreating to pornography and video games and refuse to exit the house unless it's to buy groceries. Meanwhile women, who go to the bar every weekend, maintain that men are nowhere to be found and specifically, no man is approaching. Is this sustainable? While chuds online celebrate a victory, women forecast a societal collapse and urge men to start going out before it's too late. Unfortunately, men would rather beat their meats in front of a screen and gamble their savings away instead

entry.content: >Silly Cats Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. entry.title: /o/ Auto: Why do modern BMW engines have On-Off switches for gas pedals? It's like the pow…
entry.content: Why do modern BMW engines have On-Off switches for gas pedals? It's like the power goes from 0 to Hero immediately. Makes it very difficult to apply power on corner exit. I understand why the stability control and traction control are so aggressive on these cars.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Supergirl is dead.
entry.content: Deadline said Supergirl has over $100 million in marketing. They also said it cost $170 million to as high as $183 million to make. So if we go with the low cost of $170 million that means the total cost is $270 million. So the break even point for Supergirl would be $540 million...thats when they will actually start making a profit in cinemas from the film. In scope, Superman made $618 million world wide but needed $700 million to break even. So that was a failure as well, no matter how the shi

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What can I do against cyber stalking? I've been here for a long time, and now so…
entry.content: What can I do against cyber stalking? I've been here for a long time, and now some deranged people are after me. They mass report my posts, stalk me on other social media and reveal my accounts on this site among many other bad things. Somehow, they are able to post about what I experienced throughout the day with a high accuracy, which goes beyond of just knowing my interests. These people, mostly Eastern Europeans, are self-described pedophiles, criminals, homosexuals, radical muslims, misogyn
